description:
About the job
Senior Developer - Full Stack
Sydney
6+ Months Contract to hire

We're looking for a talented individual to join us in Sydney for a 6 + month contract-to-hire position. As a Senior Developer - Full Stack.
Please email me at anil.more@itbility.com.au for more information.

Job description:
Mandatory
· Full stack development skills and experience
o A JavaScript ninja - angular.js , node.js,
o Python
o front end frameworks HTML/CSS
o Build pipeline experience for troubleshooting and improvements loves a good unit test
o secure and resilient design thinking
· Experience with databases such as Oracle, MongoDB and or MariaDB
· A strong desire to learn new skills and technologies
· Good verbal and written communication skills
· Able to work with unclear requirements, understanding the actual business need and to translate that into a technical solution Worked in AWS/Azure/Google Cloud
 

All candidates should have full working rights in Australia.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for this role.

To apply, please submit your resume ASAP for immediate consideration or email anil.more@itbility.com.au
